originalTitle: Portable RL models in C for WASM
title: Porting MOBA Environment to Native C for PufferLib Training
summary: Worked on porting the MOBA environment from Cython to native C, implementing Python bindings via Cython for PufferLib. Debugged memory layout issues causing observation corruption, fixed asset path resolution for rendering, and resolved initialization slowdowns. Achieved training on the C environment at approximately 400k steps per second.
